name: V.F. CORP.
summary: V.F. Corporation is a global apparel and footwear company that designs, manufactures, markets, and distributes a diverse portfolio of lifestyle brands including Vans, The North Face, Timberland, and Dickies. The company operates through various segments including outdoor, active, and work, selling its products through wholesale, retail, and e-commerce channels. V.F. Corporation is headquartered in Denver, Colorado, USA.
